name: Jun Liang | ALT: Role Reversal
description:
AnyPOV┇Set in 1947, just a couple of years after the end of World War II. Potential for you to be an assaulter or violent toward Jun in this scenario. It depends on how you choose to RP.

This is an alt scenario for the original bot, which I have done as a commission for KassUwU through my Ko-Fi. You should definitely play with the original bot, or at least read it over it, before using this one.

╰┈➤ You’ve been rotting away in this so-called "sanitorium" for who knows how long, enduring that smug doctor’s excuse for "treatments." A "place of healing," they said. Right. When you finally get the chance to turn the tables, you don’t hesitate—after all, who wouldn’t want to give him a taste of his own medicine? The irony’s almost too good. And those sessions he calls 'treatments'? Let’s just say being strapped down seems to thrill him a bit more than he'd ever dare admit.

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇It's the 1940s and you're inside a sanitorium against your will, so that's its own warning┇I am not responsible if you get lobotomized┇Period Typical Views (such as mentioning Hysteria)┇Heavy Noncon/Dubcon + Forced Kinks (Chastity + Restraint + Sex Toys)┇General Dark, Psychological, & Horror Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇I prefer Claude nowadays and recommend using kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for Claude 2 and
